original_prompt: vans should be assigned to a specific polygon... appointments automanage van/tech... slot coloring... address autofill... triggers attributes
rephrased_goal: Implement polygon assignment for Vans using Leaflet.draw. Automate Appointment Van/Tech assignment via spatial intersection (Point in Polygon). Auto-fill address via reverse geocoding. Color scale appointment slots based on available vans intersecting. Fix Triggers attribute reading.

tasks.description: Do-Pebble: Add leaflet-draw scripts and styles to index.html

subtasks_required: Check if leaflet.draw is in index.html

tasks.description: Do-Pebble: Update Vans view to support polygon assignment
subtasks_required: Replace marker logic with Leaflet.draw polygon tool
Save drawn polygon coordinates (GeoJSON) as `coverage_area` in van doc
Edit and display previous polygon when editing a van
tasks.testing_criteria: Vans can save and load `coverage_area` arrays.

tasks.description: Check-Pebble: Verify Vans View polygon integration
subtasks_required: Review view.vans.js logic for L.Control.Draw usage
tasks.testing_criteria: view.vans.js uses draw tools for both add and edit.

tasks.description: Do-Pebble: Update Appointments view auto-assignment, coloring, and reverse geocode
subtasks_required: Remove manual Van and Tech select drops
Implement d3-polygon-like or custom ray-casting Point-In-Polygon math in map click / processing
Address auto-filling via OpenStreetMap Nominatim reverse geocoding on map click
Auto-assign Van/Tech by intersecting the selected point with van polygons
Update the daily grid visualization to color code cells based on count of available vans (using polygon intersection if location is known, else raw van availability)
tasks.testing_criteria: Appointments automatically pick van and display address.

subtasks_required: Check view.triggers.js fetching logic for schemas
Ensure entity attributes list parses firestore-blueprint correctly
